document1: Z_Brand Z_Model is a compact electric pressure washer designed for homeowners who want strong cleaning power without gas-engine hassle. It delivers up to 2300 PSI and 1.8 GPM from an 1800W motor, making it well suited for washing cars, patios, siding, fences, and outdoor furniture. The upright frame, built-in wheels, and onboard storage keep accessories organized and easy to move. Z_Brand includes five quick-connect nozzles, a foam cannon, a 20-foot high-pressure hose, and a 35-foot power cord with GFCI protection.
document2: For everyday home cleaning, the Z_Brand Z_Model pressure washer balances performance and convenience. This electric unit produces 2300 PSI and 1.8 GPM, enough for driveway grime, deck cleanup, vehicle washing, and seasonal exterior maintenance. It comes with five quick-connect spray tips for different cleaning tasks, plus a foam cannon for soap application. The 20-foot pressure hose and 35-foot GFCI power cord give good reach around the house. A total stop system helps reduce motor wear by shutting the pump off when the trigger is released.
document3: The Z_Brand Z_Model is a user-friendly pressure washer built for reliable residential cleaning. Its 1800W electric motor generates up to 2300 PSI at 1.8 GPM, providing solid power for concrete, brick, patio furniture, grills, and vehicles. Homeowners appreciate the compact upright design, rolling wheels, and onboard accessory storage that make setup and storage simple. Included accessories are five quick-connect nozzles, a foam cannon, a 20-foot high-pressure hose, and a 35-foot power cord with GFCI. It also features an automatic total stop system for efficiency.
document4: If you want a versatile electric pressure washer, the Z_Brand Z_Model is a practical choice for routine outdoor cleaning. It offers up to 2300 PSI and 1.8 GPM from a durable 1800W motor, giving enough force for siding, fences, walkways, cars, and garage floors. The package includes five quick-connect nozzles and a foam cannon, so users can switch easily between rinsing, deep cleaning, and soap application. A 20-foot hose, 35-foot GFCI power cord, total stop system, and 2-year warranty round out this compact, easy-to-store model.
